Units

About Inside Paros

A home
that feels like Paros

Inside Paros is more than a place to stay — it's a way to experience the island as those who love it most do. Our two carefully curated units blend traditional Greek architecture with thoughtful comfort, giving you the freedom of a home and the soul of Paros.

  • Authentic Cycladic design with stone and whitewash
  • Fully equipped kitchens for the true island lifestyle
  • Intimate, private spaces — not a hotel corridor in sight
  • Warm, personal hospitality from local hosts
  • Walking distance to the village, beaches, and tavernas

Our Retreats

Two distinct ways
to experience Paros

Each unit has its own character, carefully designed to honour the island's heritage while offering the comforts of home.

Unit One

Inside Home

A bright and welcoming retreat with a king-size bedroom, a single sofa bed for additional guests, a full bathroom, and a complete kitchen. Everything you need for a perfect island stay.

King Bed Sofa Bed Full Kitchen Bathroom Up to 3 guests
Book Inside Home

Unit Two

Inside Tradition

A spacious two-room retreat steeped in character. The main bedroom features a king bed, a stylish antique wooden sofa, and a single sofa bed. A second room with a double sofa bed opens onto a dedicated kitchen and bathroom.

King Bed 2 Rooms Antique Décor Full Kitchen Up to 5 guests
Book Inside Tradition

Inside Tradition

A glimpse inside

The Island

Paros —
beyond the postcard

Paros is one of the Cyclades' most beloved islands — known for its marble, its clarity of light, and its villages of whitewashed lanes. From Inside Paros, you're at the centre of it all.

Prime location Steps from the village centre, tavernas, and local shops
Crystal clear beaches Kolimbithres, Santa Maria, and Golden Beach just minutes away
Easy to get to Daily ferry from Athens (Piraeus) — around 3 hours by fast boat

Reservations & Contact

Ready to book
your Paros escape?

Reservations are made through Airbnb. For questions, reach us directly — we love to help plan the perfect stay.
